top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race's Michigan farmland, Rolling gravel forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 62 miles.
65ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
When someone attacks on Michigan rolling farmland gravel, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
At Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
62 miles on Michigan rolling farmland gravel burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race. Train it until it feels boring.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on Michigan rolling farmland gravel. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Varied gradients on Michigan rolling farmland gravel demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 4,000ft of climbing on Michigan rolling farmland gravel does to your power file on race day.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race’s 62 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Barry-Roubaix Killer Gravel Road Race requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on michigan rolling farmland gravel to build confidence. Expect: michigan farmland, rolling gravel, 62-mile killer flagship distance.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Gravel Specific, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 62 miles of michigan rolling farmland gravel in Hastings, Michigan.
